privileged_info_summary: The task operates entirely on synthetic data dynamically generated in setup_task.sh. All expected parameters for the survey flight (including sensor size 13.2x8.8mm, focal length 12.0mm, image dimensions 5472x3648, flight altitude 120m, and overlaps 80% / 75%) strictly correspond with both the generated documentation file and the explicit expectations enforced by the verifier logic. Expected output paths are also explicitly confirmed.
